title: marrubium globosum subsp. libanoticum
intro: Marrubium globosum subsp. libanoticum is a subspecies of perennial herb in the mint family, scientifically known as Lamiaceae, native to the Middle East. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Marrubium globosum subsp. libanoticum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve stomach issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
